mapper.select: SELECT id, prompt, sql_result, is_pinned, create_time FROM sql_history ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sql_history (prompt, sql_result, is_pinned, create_time) VALUES (#{prompt}, #{sqlResult}, #{isPinned}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, prompt, sql_result, is_pinned, create_time FROM sql_history WHERE id IN
#{id}
